title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Recruitment of Junior Assistant Manager (JAM) Grade 'O' - Regional: 2026-27 
Recruitment of Assistant Manager - Grade 'A' (2 year experience) : 2026-27 
Recruitment of Junior Assistant Manager (JAM), Grade “O” : 2025-26 


Recruitment of Junior Assistant Manager- Grade 'O' Through PGDBF – 2025-26 

(Note : The Marks obtained by the candidates in the Online Test will be declared after culmination of the entire selection process.) 
Recruitment of Junior Assistant Manager (JAM), Grade “O” : 2025-26 - AAO
  * [Result of Personal Interview : Agri Asset Officer - (AAO) ](https://apps.idbibank.in/rs-idbi-manipal-addmission-2016-17.asp)
  * [Marks of Online Test & Personal Interview : Junior Assistant Manager (AAO)](https://apps.idbibank.in/rs-executive02022017.asp)


It has come to IDBI Bank Ltd.’s attention that some unscrupulous persons/ recruitment agencies have been making job offers in the name of the IDBI Bank Ltd. by issuing fake offer letters, using Bank’s name, logo and address in fake stationery. The Bank has not hired the services of any agency or individual to recruit personnel on its behalf or collect any money/ commission/ charges for training etc. IDBI Bank announces its job openings only via notifications in leading newspapers of India and on the official website viz., https://www.idbi.bank.in/idbi-bank-careers-current-openings.aspx. General public is hereby advised to exercise caution while dealing with such unscrupulous persons/ agencies.
